def correct_bracketing(brackets: str):
    """The input 'brackets' is a string containing only '<' and '>'; the function returns True when every '<' has a matching '>'.

    >>> correct_bracketing("<")
    False
    >>> correct_bracketing("<>")
    True
    >>> correct_bracketing("<<><>>")
    True
    >>> correct_bracketing("><<>")
    False
    """
